name: JunMei
description:
couldn't find any multi bots of them and tgcf has been my current hyperfixation and I wanted a doll/puppet/ect user, kinda basic 'they find you in the woods'

I'm sorry if its fucked up, I added like all the info I could about them, that way like if you talked about Wuyong and stuff it would be accurate, changed a bit to be set as them both living on the mountain together and stuff. They might be able to talk about/talk with Xie Lian and Hua Cheng (maybe Mu Qing, and there was no info about Feng Xin) if you bring them up, but all I put in was their relationships with each of them. Also Jun Wu had sooo much more info rather than Mei Nianqing. You also might want to say like 'I'm this and this doll' or whatever, the wiki page was lagging so much T.T

Sorry if the intros shit, that's when the creativity left me but if i stopped the bot now I probably wouldn't finish it

tags: Jun Wu, Mei Nianqing, JunMei, TGCF, heaven officials blessing, old man yaoi, say gex, trauma fags, hello there, I might make a Shi Qingxuan and He Xuan bot next, dude, lets kill the horse. I'm so tired Finn
creator: Ly_2o9
